title: Geothermal Reservoir Polarity Grid: Maximal Flow-Independence
strategies: baseline block grid: emit the checker's 3x3 det-2 block-diagonal 0/1 matrix (feasible by construction, honors all cemented cells) -> reproduces the baseline B = N//3 + 1 and scores ~0.1
seeded multi-restart random sampling: draw many 0/1 grids that respect the fixed cells, rank by a fast float log|det|, keep the best -- already beats the sparse block baseline

float-guided single-flip hill climbing with Sherman-Morrison inverse maintenance: from many seeded invertible starts, repeatedly flip the free cell that most multiplies |det|, updating the inverse in O(N^2); keep the best exact bit-length
structured near-Hadamard 0/1 constructions (image of a conference/Hadamard matrix under the +/-1 -> 0/1 bijection) repaired to honor the cemented cells, approaching the maximal 0/1 determinant
